data.title: TCS & AMD collaborate to bolster enterprise AI adoption, targeting AI at scale, offering industry-specific solutions.
data.description: AMD and TCS have partnered to assist businesses in advancing AI initiatives from pilot phases to large-scale production, as well as upgrading outdated IT systems and improving digital workspaces. This collaboration focuses on developing industry-specific AI and generative AI solutions by leveraging TCS's expertise and integration capabilities with AMD's high-performance computing and AI offerings. The aim is to target hybrid cloud and edge computing solutions, providing a seamless transition for enterprises looking to upscale their AI capabilities.

data.title: 675 students from Illinois to showcase love and appreciation for school choice at Chicago event on Jan. 28.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, in Chicago, 675 students hailing from various parts of Illinois are set to convene at the Merle Reskin Theater on January 28. Their primary message revolves around their deep appreciation for their educational institutions and the opportunities provided by school choice. The gathering will feature student speakers along with captivating dance performances.

data.title: Savaya Group and KAJA Group introduce Zumana, a new beachfront hospitality destination on Kuta Beach in Bali.
data.description: In Bali, Indonesia on January 14, 2026, Savaya Group partnered with PT Kharisma Anugrah Jawara Abadi (KAJA Group) to introduce Zumana, a beachfront hospitality destination located on Kuta Beach. This new venture aims to enhance the tourism experience in the area.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures fall after reports from Wells Fargo and Bank of America; Tesla to cease Full Self-Driving sales.
data.description: Stock market futures experienced a decline after Wells Fargo and Bank of America released their reports, with Citigroup's report on the horizon. In a noteworthy shift, Tesla has decided to discontinue the sale of its Full Self-Driving feature, making it available solely through a subscription model. This decision has led to speculation and discussions among investors. The Dow Jones Futures were impacted by these developments, indicating a potential shift in the market.

data.title: Concord Ed Showcase on Jan. 28 to feature 500+ NH students praising school choice at Grappone Conference Center.
data.description: In Concord, New Hampshire on January 14, 2026, over 500 students from various schools in the state will assemble at the Grappone Conference Center on January 28. Their primary aim is to express their appreciation for school choice and showcase their affection for their respective educational institutions. The event is set to feature student representatives coming together to convey this sentiment.

data.title: 550+ NC students to attend Raleigh School Choice Celebration on Jan. 29 at Martin Marietta Center for the Performing Arts. #Education #Students #SchoolChoice
data.description: Over 550 students hailing from different parts of North Carolina are set to assemble at the Martin Marietta Center for the Performing Arts in Raleigh on Thursday, Jan. 29, 2026. The purpose of their gathering is to express their adoration for their respective schools. This event will highlight various K–12 charter schools in the region.

data.title: Bankinter contributes $35M in Bit2Me round, aligning with Tether & BBVA. Spanish exchange secures MiCA license in 2025.
data.description: Bankinter has recently participated in a $35 million investment round alongside Tether and BBVA. This comes after a Spanish crypto exchange obtained its MiCA license in 2025, allowing it to engage in regulated activities. The investment marks Bankinter's entrance into the cryptocurrency space and further solidifies the exchange's position in the market.

data.title: Alpaca secures $150M Series D funding, valued at $1.15B, led by Drive Capital, with a $40M credit line.
data.description: Alpaca, a prominent brokerage infrastructure provider based in San Mateo, California, has successfully raised $150 million in their Series D funding round. This funding was led by Drive Capital and has resulted in the company being valued at $1.15 billion. As a part of the investment, Chris Olsen, the Co-Founder and Partner at Drive Capital, will be joining Alpaca’s Board of Directors. Additionally, the company has secured a substantial $40 million line of credit, which will bolster their balance sheet and support their ongoing growth initiatives. This achievement further solidifies Alpaca’s position in the market and demonstrates strong investor confidence in their business.

data.title: Banagua named "Best New Brand" by Beverage Digest for emerging banana water brand, with rapid growth since launch under six months ago.
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee, Banagua, a brand specializing in single-ingredient banana water, has been recognized as the "Best New Brand" by Beverage Digest. Within just under six months of its launch, Banagua has become one of the rapidly rising stars in the healthy beverage sector. This brand has garnered significant traction in the beverage market by securing national retail placements, witnessing a substantial early uptake from consumers, and receiving accolades from key figures in the food and beverage industry.

data.title: GLOW denounces DOJ weaponization in Renee Good shooting, applauds resignations. DOJ prosecutors mass resign.
data.description: In Sacramento, California on January 14, 2026, GLOW - Government Lawyers Oversight Watchdog, a non-profit organization focused on monitoring the behavior of executive branch legal professionals, released a statement concerning the significant wave of departures in the Department of Justice (DOJ).

data.title: BNB price estimated to hit $980 by February. Currently trading at $931, with key support level at $906 for bullish trend.
data.description: The current price of Binance Coin is $931, showing bullish momentum. Technical analysis indicates a possible breakout towards the $980 resistance level, emphasizing the importance of the $906 support level for bullish investors.

data.title: Connect Trade partners with Benzinga to enhance retail trading platforms using API connectivity. Collaboration announced on Jan 14, 2026.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, Connect Trade, an API-focused connectivity platform for retail brokers and trading platforms, revealed a new partnership with Benzinga, a prominent financial media and data provider based in Detroit. This collaboration is set to enhance the services offered by both companies and bring about synergies in the financial sector.

data.title: Bankinter invests $34M in Bit2Me for EU fintech growth. The Spanish exchange aims to expand post MiCa licensing in 2025.
data.description: After receiving its MiCa license in 2025, Bankinter has teamed up with stablecoin leader Tether in a $34 million investment round. The goal is to support the European expansion of the Spanish crypto exchange.

data.title: Encore Search Partners named #1 executive search firm by Houston Business Journal after year of record performance.
data.description: In Houston, as of January 14, 2026, Encore Search Partners has achieved the top position according to the Houston Business Journal. This ranking was secured after a successful year of outstanding performance, supported by substantial investments in individuals, procedures, and technology. The recognition is awarded to executive search firms based on various criteria.

data.title: FiscalNote completes migration of customers to PolicyNote from legacy platform, a significant achievement.
data.description: In Washington, FiscalNote has reached a significant achievement with PolicyNote by successfully migrating all customers from the older FiscalNote platform. This marks a major milestone for the company as it transitions its customers to the new platform for policy-related services and solutions.

data.title: Subscriptions are evolving as consumers now manage them actively, as per Recurly's 2026 report, making business models stronger.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Recurly, a prominent subscription growth platform, has unveiled the 2026 State of Subscriptions report. The report highlights a significant shift in consumer behavior towards subscription services, indicating a positive impact on the business model. Consumers are now actively managing their subscriptions, pausing them when necessary, cancelling if the value diminishes, and re-subscribing when the service aligns with their needs. This shift reflects a more engaged approach by consumers towards subscriptions rather than viewing them as fixed expenses.
